manuscript-formatter.assertion: Output contains the complete reformatted text followed by a Formatting Notes section listing significant changes
No content has been altered, added, or removed except where flagged in the notes
Formatting notes list every significant structural change for editorial review

web-section-splitter.assertion: Output divides the article into numbered sections each with a subheading, word count, and reading time
Subheadings are specific and scannable - reading them in order tells a coherent story
Output ends with a summary table showing total word count, sections, reading time, and pull quote count

fact-sheet-compiler.assertion: Output contains clearly labelled sections including Overview, Key Facts, and at least one of Timeline/Key Players/Glossary
Every fact is attributed to a source or flagged as unverified
Missing information is flagged explicitly rather than silently omitted

teaser-block-writer.assertion: Each teaser contains a headline, 1-2 summary sentences, and requested metadata fields
Hook structures vary across the block - no two teasers open the same way
Teasers are self-contained and comprehensible without reading the source article

asset-description-writer.assertion: Output contains structured metadata fields: Asset Title, Description, Keywords, Asset Type, Collection, Creator, Date, Rights
Description leads with the most searchable and distinguishing feature of the asset
Missing information is explicitly marked as 'Not provided' rather than omitted

author-bio-writer.assertion: Bio is within 10% of the requested word count with word count noted after the text
The most relevant credential for the article topic appears in the first sentence
No filler phrases or vague superlatives - every sentence conveys specific information

cms-metadata-writer.assertion: Output contains SEO Title, Meta Description, URL Slug, Tags, Category, OG Title, and OG Description with character counts
SEO title is within 60 characters and includes the primary keyword
OG title and description are distinct from SEO fields - optimised for social, not search
